senses.definition_dg: Pesa ambayo mutu anariphishwa kpwa kosa arilohenda.

examples.dg: Waikirwa faini kpwa kuvundza sheria ya barabara.
examples.en: He was given a fine for breaking the traffic law.
examples.sw: Aliwekewa faini kwa kuvunja sheria ya barabara.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya mgbwanga.

examples.dg: Falaki ni chitu chinahumirwa na atu a kare.
examples.en: Falaki is something used by people in the old days.
examples.sw: Falaki ni kitu kinachotumika na watu wa zamani.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala dza mutu wanjina ama chitu chanjina kpwa sura ama tabia.

examples.dg: Mwana hiye anafanana na babaye sana.
examples.en: That child resembles his father a lot.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule anafanana na baba yake sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika vitu viiri phamwenga kpwa kuona tofauti na kufwanana kpwao.

examples.dg: Mwalimu wafananisha maneno mairi.
examples.en: The teacher compared two words.
examples.sw: Mwalimu alifananisha maneno mawili.

equivalents_en: small pole that supports the roof of a house
equivalents_sw: mti mdogo unaolazwa kwa kujengea mapaa

senses.definition_en: small pole that supports the roof of a house
senses.definition_sw: mti mdogo unaolazwa kwa kujengea mapaa
senses.definition_dg: Muhi mdide unaolazwa kpwa kuteremisha dari ya nyumba ya chila.

examples.dg: Farasi zinahumirwa kudzenga dari ya nyumba.
examples.en: Small poles are used to build the roof of the house.
examples.sw: Miti midogo inatumika kujenga paa la nyumba.

senses.definition_en: to comfort, to console, to encourage
senses.definition_dg: Kupha mutu moyo ariphoona shida ama msongo, kumupha faraja.

examples.dg: Hwamufariji jirani ariyefirwa ni mwanawe.
examples.en: We comforted the neighbor who lost his child.
examples.sw: Tulimfariji jirani aliyefiwa na mtoto wake.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya fukiza.

examples.dg: Fatiya ni chitu chinahumirwa kpwa ibada.
examples.en: Fatiya is something used in worship.
examples.sw: Fatiya ni kitu kinachotumika katika ibada.

equivalents_en: kutiya to pray Islamic prayers of thanks
equivalents_sw: kumshukuru Mungu katika maombi ya Kiislamu

senses.definition_en: , kutiya to pray Islamic prayers of thanks
senses.definition_sw: kumshukuru Mungu katika maombi ya Kiislamu
senses.definition_dg: Kuswali maswali ga kushukuru kpwa njira ya Chiislamu.

examples.dg: Bada ya kuswali, imamu wafatiya.
examples.en: After praying, the imam said the thanksgiving prayer.
examples.sw: Baada ya kuswali, imamu alifanya dua ya shukrani.

senses.definition_dg: Chuma chenye rangi ya kizungu chenye samani kulu, chinahumirwa kpwa kuhendza mapambo.

examples.dg: Pete ya feza ni nono sana.
examples.en: The silver ring is very beautiful.
examples.sw: Pete ya fedha ni nzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Dziwe rinahumirwa kpwa kuikira sufuriya dzikoni wakati wa kuphika.

examples.dg: Ika sufuriya dzulu ya mafiga na uase moho.
examples.en: Put the pot on the cooking stones and light the fire.
examples.sw: Weka sufuria juu ya majifya na uwashe moto.

senses.definition_dg: Chiungo cha ndani ya mwiri ambacho chinatera kusafisha milatso.

examples.dg: Mutu ana figo mbiri mwirini.
examples.en: A person has two kidneys in the body.
examples.sw: Mtu ana figo mbili mwilini.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya hadi kuisha kpwa safari, kufikira phatu.

examples.dg: Hwafika Mombasa muhala wa rero.
examples.en: We arrived in Mombasa this afternoon.
examples.sw: Tulifika Mombasa mchana wa leo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira achili kpwa kuona na kuelewa mambo.

examples.dg: Fikiri vinono kabla ya kulavya uamuzi.
examples.en: Think carefully before making a decision.
examples.sw: Fikiri vizuri kabla ya kutoa uamuzi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira achili kuhusu dzambo fulani, kuganaganiya.

examples.dg: Nafikiriya kuhusu njira ya kuripha deni.
examples.en: I am thinking about how to pay the debt.
examples.sw: Ninafikiria kuhusu jinsi ya kulipa deni.

equivalents_en: rub with fingers (e.g. eyes or leaf)

senses.definition_en: to rub with fingers (e.g. eyes or leaf)
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga chitu kpwa vidole, kama kupiga matso ama majani.

examples.dg: Mwana nkufikitsa matsoge kpwa mana ganamwasha.
examples.en: The child is rubbing his eyes because they are itching.
examples.sw: Mtoto anafikicha macho yake kwa sababu yanawasha.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya fwimbo.

examples.dg: Mzehe nkuhumira fimbo kunyendeka.
examples.en: The elder uses a stick to walk.
examples.sw: Mzee anatumia fimbo kutembea.

senses.definition_en: talisman, charm used to protect property through witchcraft (utsai), relic or sacred object located in a kaya forest
senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kudzindza ambacho chinahumirwa kurinda mali kpwa utsai, chitu cha heshima kpwa kaya.

examples.dg: Fingo za kaya zinahifadhiwa tsakani.
examples.en: The sacred relics of the kaya are preserved in the forest.
examples.sw: Fingo za kaya zinahifadhiwa msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Mimea kunyala na kukala kavu kpwa sababu ya kukosa madzi.

examples.dg: Mimea ikafinyalala kpwa sababu ya dzuwa kali.
examples.en: The plants withered because of the intense heat.
examples.sw: Mimea ilisinyaa kwa sababu ya jua kali.

senses.definition_dg: Kuumba vitu kpwa udongo, kama nyungu ama sufuriya.

examples.dg: Mchetu nkufinyanga nyungu kpwa udongo.
examples.en: The woman is moulding a pot from clay.
examples.sw: Mwanamke anafinyanga chungu kwa udongo.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya fwira.

examples.dg: Fira ni neno ra kare, rero huamba fwira.
examples.en: Fira is an old word, today we say fwira.
examples.sw: Fira ni neno la zamani, leo tunasema fwira.

senses.definition_dg: Pepho wa Chidigo ambaye anaaminiwa ni atu a kare.

examples.dg: Firamoyo ni pepho ambaye anaaminiwa anaweza kuinjira mutu.
examples.en: Firamoyo is a spirit believed to be able to possess a person.
examples.sw: Firamoyo ni pepo ambaye anaaminiwa anaweza kumwingia mtu.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo chidide cha kupigira ambacho chinahenda sauti kali.

examples.dg: Mwalimu wapiga firimbi atu asimame.
examples.en: The teacher blew the whistle for people to stand.
examples.sw: Mwalimu alipiga filimbi watu wasimame.

senses.definition_en: to reach, to attain (e.g. a certain age)
senses.definition_dg: Kufikira phatu fulani ama chipimo fulani, kama umuri.

examples.dg: Mwana akafisa umuri wa kuphiya sukuli.
examples.en: The child reached school-going age.
examples.sw: Mtoto alifikisha umri wa kwenda shule.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphirika chitu phatu fulani, kupeleka.

examples.dg: Fisa barua hino kpwa jirani.
examples.en: Take this letter to the neighbor.
examples.sw: Peleka barua hii kwa jirani.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama mkpwulu wa tsakani ariye na sauti ya ajabu na anarya nyama za atu anjina.

examples.dg: Proverb: Fisi richirya mkpwongo, mzima funga mryango
examples.en: If a hyena eats a sick person, the healthy person should shut the door
examples.sw: Fisi akila mgonjwa, mzima funga mlango.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga kueneza uasi na kutengana kahi ya atu.

examples.dg: Usieneze fitina kahi ya jirani.
examples.en: Don't spread discord among neighbors.
examples.sw: Usieneze fitina kati ya majirani.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga kelele kulu, kugomba kpwa sauti kulu.

examples.dg: Mwana nkufiya kululu kpwa mana anaogopa.
examples.en: The child is shouting loudly because he is scared.
examples.sw: Mtoto anapiga kelele kwa sababu anaogopa.

senses.definition_dg: Karatasi yenye maswali ambayo inarodzwa kpwa kuika taarifa.

examples.dg: Rodza fomu hino kabla ya kuiphirika ofisini.
examples.en: Fill in this form before taking it to the office.
examples.sw: Jaza fomu hii kabla ya kuipeleka ofisini.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya pepho ambaye anaaminiwa ni atu a kare.

examples.dg: Foro ni pepho ambaye anaaminiwa anaweza kuhendza ama kubaya.
examples.en: Foro is a spirit believed to be able to do good or harm.
examples.sw: Foro ni pepo ambaye anaaminiwa anaweza kufanya mema au mabaya.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra Chiingereza rinaonyesa kuphaha chitu.

examples.dg: Chidigo china maneno manji ga asili ya Chiswahili.
examples.en: Digo has many words of Swahili origin.
examples.sw: Kidigo kina maneno mengi ya asili ya Kiswahili.

senses.definition_dg: Kuishi tsona bada ya kukala ukafwa.

examples.dg: Atu anaamini kala akufwa andafufuka siku moja.
examples.en: People believe that the dead will rise one day.
examples.sw: Watu wanaamini kuwa wafu watafufuka siku moja.

equivalents_en: fan a flame by blowing on it

senses.definition_en: to fan a flame by blowing on it
senses.definition_dg: Kupuliza moho kpwa kanwa ili uake zaidi.

examples.dg: Afufurira moho ili itsome dzala
examples.en: He fanned the fire so that it would burn the rubbish
examples.sw: Alipulizia moto ili uchome taka.

senses.definition_en: to raise an animal, to tame
senses.definition_dg: Kurera nyama ama mifugo, kuaika kpwa kaya.

examples.dg: Atu a phatu hipho anafuga mbuzi na kuku.
examples.en: The people of that place raise goats and chickens.
examples.sw: Watu wa mahali hapo wanafuga mbuzi na kuku.

senses.definition_dg: Kelele nyinji za kutsukiza, ghasia.

examples.dg: Anafundzi anagahenda fujo darasani.
examples.en: The students are making noise in the classroom.
examples.sw: Wanafunzi wanafanya fujo darasani.

senses.definition_en: to rise up (of smoke), to evaporate
senses.definition_dg: Moho kutulusa mosi dzulu, ama madzi kuwa mvuke.

examples.dg: Mosi unafuka kula dzikoni.
examples.en: Smoke is rising from the kitchen.
examples.sw: Moshi unafuka kutoka jikoni.

senses.definition_dg: Kuvuna mimea idziyomera photsi, kama karanga.

examples.dg: Hwafuka karanga mwezi huno.
examples.en: We harvested groundnuts this month.
examples.sw: Tulivuna karanga mwezi huu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuasa ubani ama chitu chanjina chenye marashi ili chiike mosi mnono.

examples.dg: Mayo nkufukiza ubani ndani ya nyumba.
examples.en: Mother is burning incense inside the house.
examples.sw: Mama anafukiza ubani ndani ya nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Ukoo wa uphande wa mayo, kundi ra atu a uganani kpwa damu ya mayo.

examples.dg: Fuko ra mayo rangu ni kulu sana phatu hipho.
examples.en: My mother's clan is very large there.
examples.sw: Ukoo wa mama yangu ni mkubwa sana mahali hapo.

senses.definition_dg: Ukoo wa uphande wa mayo, kundi ra atu a uganani kpwa damu ya mayo.

examples.dg: Fuko ra mayo rangu ni kulu sana phatu hipho.
examples.en: My mother's clan is very large there.
examples.sw: Ukoo wa mama yangu ni mkubwa sana mahali hapo.

equivalents_sw: place where a wild animal sleeps; mahali pa kulala kwa

senses.definition_sw: place where a wild animal sleeps; mahali pa kulala kwa

sub_entries.definition_sw: the place where a hen lays its eggs; fuko

senses.definition_dg: Kuchimba chitu ambacho kala chikiikpwa ndani ya udongo.

examples.dg: Anafukula manga
examples.en: He is digging up the cassava
examples.sw: Wanafukua muhogo shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuosha nguwo kpwa madzi na sabuni.

examples.dg: Mayo nkufula nguwo muhoni.
examples.en: Mother is washing clothes at the river.
examples.sw: Mama anafua nguo mtoni.

equivalents_en: peel off a coconut's outer husk

senses.definition_en: to peel off a coconut's outer husk
senses.definition_dg: Kuondosa ganda ra kondze ra nazi.

examples.dg: Baba nkufula nazi kpwa fimbo kali.
examples.en: Father is peeling off the coconut husks with a sharp stick.
examples.sw: Baba anafua nazi kwa fimbo kali.

equivalents_en: chisima to clean out the inside of a well

senses.definition_en: chisima to clean out the inside of a well
senses.definition_dg: Kuosha nguwo kpwa madzi na sabuni.

examples.dg: Mayo nkufula nguwo muhoni.
examples.en: Mother is washing clothes at the river.
examples.sw: Mama anafua nguo mtoni.

senses.definition_en: chuma to work iron, to do the work of a blacksmith
senses.definition_dg: Kuondosa ganda ra kondze ra nazi.

examples.dg: Baba nkufula nazi kpwa fimbo kali.
examples.en: Father is peeling off the coconut husks with a sharp stick.
examples.sw: Baba anafua nazi kwa fimbo kali.

senses.definition_en: such a one, a certain one, so-and-so, such and such (things), alluding
senses.definition_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa mutu ama chitu ambacho humanyikani vizuri.

examples.dg: Mutu fulani akakpwedza kukuendza dzana.
examples.en: A certain person came looking for you yesterday.
examples.sw: Mtu fulani alikuja kukutafuta jana.

sub_entries.definition_en: persons or things for reference only

senses.definition_en: to run at a high speed
senses.definition_dg: Kukimbia kpwa kasi kulu sana.

examples.dg: Mwana akafuli hadi nyumbani ariphokala anaogopa.
examples.en: The child ran at full speed home when he was scared.
examples.sw: Mtoto alikimbia kwa kasi sana hadi nyumbani alipokuwa anaogopa.

senses.definition_en: to go straight to a place
senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya kpwa njira mwenga kpwa mwenga hadi phatu, bila kuangamana.

examples.dg: Fululiza hadi phatu pha mkpwutano, usigaluke.
examples.en: Go straight to the meeting place, don't turn.
examples.sw: Fululiza hadi mahali pa mkutano, usigeuke.

senses.definition_dg: Nguwo zirizofungbwa phamwenga kpwa kuphirika.

examples.dg: Funga fulushi ra nguwo ndipho uphiye.
examples.en: Tie the bundle of clothes and then go.
examples.sw: Funga furushi la nguo ndipo uende.

senses.definition_dg: Kutengeneza nguo ama vitu kpwa sindano na uzi.

examples.dg: Binti nkufuma sweta ya babaye.
examples.en: The girl is knitting a sweater for her father.
examples.sw: Binti anafuma sweta ya baba yake.

senses.definition_en: to come on a person suddenly, to catch someone red-handed
senses.definition_dg: Kumgwira mutu ariphokala anahenda chitu cha siri.

examples.dg: Hwamufumanira mwivi achiiba vitu vyehu.
examples.en: We caught the thief red-handed stealing our things.
examples.sw: Tulimfumania mwizi akiiba vitu vyetu.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya ndani ya mkpwono, ganja ra mkpwono.

examples.dg: Ika pesa ndani ya fumba ra mkpwono.
examples.en: Put the money in the palm of the hand.
examples.sw: Weka pesa ndani ya ganja la mkono.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga hekima ga kare ambago ganahumira mifwano kpwa kuelezera ukpweli.

examples.dg: Azee a Chidigo ana mafumbo manji.
examples.en: Digo elders have many proverbs.
examples.sw: Wazee wa Kidigo wana misemo mingi.

senses.definition_dg: Swali ra kuchemsha ubongo, kama kutsupa maneno.

examples.dg: Mwanafundzi nkuamua fumbo ra mwalimu.
examples.en: The student is solving the teacher's puzzle.
examples.sw: Mwanafunzi anaamua fumbo la mwalimu.

equivalents_sw: a kind of bottom-dwelling freshwater fish (Bagrus bayad); kambare

senses.definition_sw: a kind of bottom-dwelling freshwater fish (Bagrus bayad); kambare
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki anayeishi photsi ya muho.

examples.dg: Fumi ni samaki ariye nono wa kuphikira.
examples.en: The mudfish is a delicious fish for cooking.
examples.sw: Kambare ni samaki mzuri wa kupikia.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama mkpwulu wa tsakani anayefwanana na ng'ombe ela ni wa porini.

examples.dg: Fumo ni nyama wa porini ambaye ni hatari.
examples.en: The wildebeest is a wild animal that is dangerous.
examples.sw: Nyumbu ni mnyama wa porini ambaye ni hatari.

senses.definition_en: to unpick a hem or seam
senses.definition_dg: Kuphula uzi uriofumwa, kutengula pindo.

examples.dg: Mayo akafumula pindo ra nguo iriyovundzika.
examples.en: Mother unpicked the hem of the torn garment.
examples.sw: Mama alifumua pindo la nguo iliyopasuka.

equivalents_en: kupiga to take a large mouthful of a liquid

senses.definition_en: , kupiga to take a large mouthful of a liquid
senses.definition_dg: Kuhala mdomo mzima wa madzi na kumiza kpwa mara moja.

examples.dg: Wafunda madzi manji kpwa mara moja.
examples.en: He took a big mouthful of water all at once.
examples.sw: Alifunda maji mengi kwa mara moja.

senses.definition_sw: person skilled in any art, craft or profession; fundi
senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye na ujuzi wa kuhenda kazi fulani, kama kudzenga ama kushona.

examples.dg: Fundi wa nyumba anadzenga vinono sana.
examples.en: The house builder builds very well.
examples.sw: Fundi wa nyumba anajenga vizuri sana.

senses.definition_en: to fill one's mouth with food, to cram one's mouth full of food
senses.definition_dg: Kudzaza kanwa na chakurya chinji.

examples.dg: Usifundire kanwa na chakurya chinji, undasongbwa.
examples.en: Don't cram your mouth full of food, you will choke.
examples.sw: Usijaze mdomo na chakula kingi, utasongwa.

equivalents_en: seal or stop e.g. the mouth of a bottle

senses.definition_en: to seal or stop e.g. the mouth of a bottle
senses.definition_dg: Kufunga tundu ra chupa ama chombo ili chitu ndani chisituluke.

examples.dg: Fundira chupa hiyo vizuri ili madzi gasimwagike.
examples.en: Seal that bottle well so the water doesn't spill.
examples.sw: Funga chupa hiyo vizuri ili maji yasimwagike.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu mdide sana anayeinjira ngozi ya magulu na kuuma sana.

examples.dg: Fundza ni dudu wa hatari hasa kpwa ana adide.
examples.en: The jigger is a dangerous insect especially for small children.
examples.sw: Funza ni mdudu hatari hasa kwa watoto wadogo.

senses.definition_dg: Kumupha mutu maarifa, kuonyesa mutu njira ya kuhenda chitu.

examples.dg: Mwalimu anafundza wanafundzi Chidigo.
examples.en: The teacher is teaching the students Digo.
examples.sw: Mwalimu anafundisha wanafunzi Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachofundzwa, somo ambaro mutu anamupha mwanjina.

examples.dg: Fundzo ra rero ni ra muhimu sana.
examples.en: Today's teaching is very important.
examples.sw: Fundisho la leo ni muhimu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu hadi chisiwe wazi, kama mulango, ama kufunga kamba.

examples.dg: Funga mulango kabla ya kulala.
examples.en: Close the door before sleeping.
examples.sw: Funga mlango kabla ya kulala.

equivalents_en: futswe something well doesn't hurt the hand (take proper care of things)

senses.definition_en: futswe something well doesn't hurt the hand (take proper care of things)
senses.definition_dg: Kuricha kurya kpwa wakati fulani, kufunga.

examples.dg: Atu a Chiislamu anafungahe mwezi wa Ramadhani.
examples.en: Muslims fast during the month of Ramadan.
examples.sw: Waislamu hufunga mwezi wa Ramadhani.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari saba kpwa luga ya kare ya Chidigo.

examples.dg: Akare kala nkuamba fungahe badala ya saba.
examples.en: The elders used to say 'fungahe' instead of seven.
examples.sw: Wazee walikuwa wanasema 'fungahe' badala ya saba.

equivalents_en: use magic to blind viewers against certain operations

senses.definition_en: to use magic to blind viewers against certain operations
senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira utsai kpwa kupoha matso ga atu asione chitu unachohenda.

examples.dg: Mtsai wafungaliza atu asione chitu.
examples.en: The sorcerer blinded the people so they wouldn't see anything.
examples.sw: Mchawi aliwakiini macho watu wasione kitu.

senses.definition_en: to pack, to prepare for a journey
senses.definition_dg: Kutayarisha vitu kpwa kuphiya safari, kuika vitu phamwenga.

examples.dg: Proverb: Charo cha muhondo chifunganywa rero
examples.en: Tomorrow's journey is prepared for today
examples.sw: Safari ya kesho hufunganywa leo.

equivalents_sw: pay a deposit in order to secure goods; kufungisha

senses.definition_sw: to pay a deposit in order to secure goods; kufungisha
senses.definition_dg: Kuripha pesa kidogo kpwa kuhifadhi bidhaa.

examples.dg: Wafungiza pesa kidogo kpwa kuhifadhi gari.
examples.en: He put down a deposit to secure the car.
examples.sw: Aliweka dhamana kidogo kuhifadhi gari.

equivalents_en: prevent someone from moving because of rain

senses.definition_en: to prevent someone from moving because of rain
senses.definition_dg: Mvula kukuzuwiya usiphiye phatu.

examples.dg: Mvula ikanifungiza, siweza kuphiya kazini
examples.en: The has rain trapped me, I can't go to work
examples.sw: Mvua ilinizuia, siwezi kwenda kazini.

senses.definition_sw: fungo, aina ya ngawa (yaani paka wa zabadi)
senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa tsakani ariye mdide anayefwanana na paka, ana harufu kali.

examples.dg: Fungo anaishi tsakani na anakala wadudu.
examples.en: The civet cat lives in the forest and eats insects.
examples.sw: Fungo anaishi msituni na anakula wadudu.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra vitu virivyoikpwa phamwenga.

examples.dg: Ganya vitu hivi kpwa mafungu mairi.
examples.en: Divide these things into two groups.
examples.sw: Gawanya vitu hivi kwa makundi mawili.

senses.definition_dg: Kurya chakurya cha mapema kpwa ligundzu.

examples.dg: Fungula kabla ya kuphiya kazini.
examples.en: Have breakfast before going to work.
examples.sw: Fungua kinywa kabla ya kwenda kazini.

senses.definition_en: to give a present, especially to a bride at her wedding
senses.definition_sw: kutoa zawadi, hasa kwa mwanamke wakati wa ndoa
senses.definition_dg: Kupha zawadi, hasa kpwa bibi arusi wakati wa arusi.

examples.dg: Ajeni akamufungula bibi arusi zawadi nyinji.
examples.en: The guests gave the bride many gifts.
examples.sw: Wageni walimpa bibi arusi zawadi nyingi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na moyo mnono, kukala na raha.

examples.dg: Hwafurahi sana ariphosikira habari nono.
examples.en: We were very happy when we heard the good news.
examples.sw: Tulifurahi sana tuliposikia habari njema.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi kudzala hadi gamwagike kupita chipimo.

examples.dg: Muho ukafurika kpwa sababu ya mvula kulu.
examples.en: The river overflowed because of the heavy rain.
examples.sw: Mto ulifurika kwa sababu ya mvua kubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi manji ambago ganafurika na kuenea phatu phosi.

examples.dg: Furiko rikabananga nyumba nyinji za kanda-kanda ya muho.
examples.en: The flood destroyed many houses along the river.
examples.sw: Mafuriko yaliharibu nyumba nyingi kando ya mto.

senses.definition_en: to thrash about, to flail, to struggle, to kick with arms and legs
senses.definition_dg: Kupigana kpwa mikpwono na magulu, kurwa hiku na hiku.

examples.dg: Mwivi wafurukuta photsi wakati kala anapigbwa
examples.en: The thief was thrashing about on the ground when he was beaten
examples.sw: Mwizi alifurukuta chini alipokuwa anapigwa.

equivalents_en: traditional medicine used to nullify a serious or sensitive case so that

senses.definition_en: traditional medicine used to nullify a serious or sensitive case so that
senses.definition_dg: Dawa ya chila inayohumirwa kutulusa shauri kulu.

examples.dg: Mganga wahumira fusa kpwa kuterya mutu wa shauri.
examples.en: The traditional healer used medicine to help the person with a case.
examples.sw: Mganga alitumia dawa kwa kusaidia mtu mwenye shauri.

sub_entries.definition_en: person does not take matters to court
sub_entries.definition_sw: dawa ya kienyeji ya kuhairisha mambo

equivalents_en: use traditional medicine to cause someone to forget a wrong or a debt
equivalents_sw: kutumia dawa ya kienyeji ili mtu asahau makosa ama deni

senses.definition_en: to use traditional medicine to cause someone to forget a wrong or a debt
senses.definition_sw: kutumia dawa ya kienyeji ili mtu asahau makosa ama deni
senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira dawa ya chila kumuhendza mutu asahau kosa ama deni.

examples.dg: Mganga wamufusa ili asahau deni.
examples.en: The healer used traditional medicine to make him forget the debt.
examples.sw: Mganga alimfusa ili asahau deni.

equivalents_en: kudzifukiza      to burn and inhale incense as a preparation for

senses.definition_en: , kudzifukiza      to burn and inhale incense as a preparation for
senses.definition_dg: Kufukiza ubani na kuuvuta kpwa kutayarisha mwiri kpwa ibada.

examples.dg: Binti akadzifukiza fuso kabla ya kuphiya ibadani.
examples.en: The girl burned and inhaled incense before going to worship.
examples.sw: Binti alijifukizia ubani kabla ya kwenda ibadani.

senses.definition_en: to erase, to rub out, to abolish
senses.definition_dg: Kuondosa chitu chirichoandikpwa ama kuikpwa, kuhendza chisionekane.

examples.dg: Futa maneno gara kula kpwa ubao.
examples.en: Erase those words from the board.
examples.sw: Futa maneno hayo kutoka kwenye ubao.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki mkpwulu wa baharini.

examples.dg: Fute ni samaki mnono wa kuphikira.
examples.en: Fute is a delicious fish for cooking.
examples.sw: Fute ni samaki mzuri wa kupikia.

equivalents_en: measuring tape (from English unit of length: 'foot')

senses.definition_en: measuring tape (from English unit of length: 'foot')
senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kupimira urefu, futi.

examples.dg: Humira futi kupima urefu wa nyumba.
examples.en: Use the measuring tape to measure the length of the house.
examples.sw: Tumia futi kupima urefu wa nyumba.

senses.definition_en: to draw out, to take out
senses.definition_dg: Kutulusa chitu kula ndani ya chitu chanjina.

examples.dg: Futsula chisu kula kpwa ala yache.
examples.en: Draw the knife out of its sheath.
examples.sw: Chomoa kisu kutoka kwenye ala yake.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mimea ya tsakani inayohumirwa kama mboga.

examples.dg: Futsure ni mboga inayomera tsakani.
examples.en: Futsure is a vegetable that grows in the forest.
examples.sw: Futsure ni mboga inayomea msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya mimea ya tsakani inayohumirwa kama mboga.

examples.dg: Futswe ni mimea inayohumirwa kpwa mchuzi.
examples.en: Futswe is a plant used for stew.
examples.sw: Futswe ni mmea unaotumika kwa mchuzi.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya fwererwa.

examples.dg: Jirani akafutuka na anasononeka sana.
examples.en: The neighbor was bereaved and is mourning deeply.
examples.sw: Jirani amefiwa na anahuzunika sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mwiri mkpwulu kpwa kuvimba.

examples.dg: Mguu wache ukafutuka kpwa sababu ya utseketo.
examples.en: Her leg swelled because of the sting.
examples.sw: Mguu wake ulifura kwa sababu ya kuumwa.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki.

examples.dg: Futula ni samaki wa baharini.
examples.en: Futula is a sea fish.
examples.sw: Futula ni samaki wa baharini.

senses.definition_en: to inflate, to blow air into something, to fill with air
senses.definition_dg: Kutiya hewa ndani ya chitu ili chipule, kupuliza.

examples.dg: Futula baluni hiyo kpwa kanwa.
examples.en: Inflate that balloon with your mouth.
examples.sw: Puliza baluni hiyo kwa mdomo.

senses.definition_en: to inflate a lot, to cause to bulge with air
senses.definition_dg: Kutiya hewa nyinji ndani ya chitu hadi chipule sana.

examples.dg: Usifutuze baluni sana, indaphuluka.
examples.en: Don't inflate the balloon too much, it will burst.
examples.sw: Usifurishe baluni sana, itapasuka.

equivalents_en: be paralysed in part of the body (e.g. leg

senses.definition_en: to be paralysed in part of the body (e.g. leg, arm)
senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mwiri kukala kala kaifwanya kazi, kupooza.

examples.dg: Uchifuwa chigulu kuweza kunyendeka vinono
examples.en: If your leg is paralysed you can't walk well
examples.sw: Ukipooza mguu huwezi kutembea vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsukiza mutu, kumuhendza akale na hasira.

examples.dg: Usimuhuwe jirani wako kpwa maneno mabaya.
examples.en: Don't offend your neighbor with bad words.
examples.sw: Usimkasihishe jirani wako kwa maneno mabaya.

equivalents_sw: kufananisha katika hali ya kufanya kitu

senses.definition_en: to be inferior, to be not as good as
senses.definition_sw: kufananisha katika hali ya kufanya kitu, kuwa mdogo kuliko wengine
senses.definition_dg: Kukala si mnono dza mutu wanjina, kukala wa photsi.

examples.dg: Simanya kala mimi nafuwa kuriko aho
examples.en: I don't think I am inferior to them
examples.sw: Sikujua kwamba mimi ni mdogo kuliko wao.

senses.definition_en: to bore holes (only used of insects)
senses.definition_dg: Wadudu kutoboka mashimo ndani ya muhi ama chitu chanjina.

examples.dg: Wadudu anafuza mihi ya nyumbani.
examples.en: Insects are boring holes in the house timbers.
examples.sw: Wadudu wanafuza miti ya nyumbani.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mwiri ya dzulu kanda-kanda ya shingo, bega.

examples.dg: Mzigo ukamupiga fuzi kpwa sababu ni mzito.
examples.en: The load hurt his shoulder because it was heavy.
examples.sw: Mzigo ulimgonga bega kwa sababu ni mzito.

senses.definition_en: mole snake (Pseudaspis cana), a type of snake which preys
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyoka mkpwulu ambaye anarya panya na nyama anjina adide.

examples.dg: Fuzopanya ni nyoka asiye na sumu.
examples.en: The mole snake is a non-venomous snake.
examples.sw: Fuzopanya ni nyoka asiye na sumu.

sub_entries.definition_sw: aina ya nyoka anayependa kuwinda panya

senses.definition_dg: Msiba ama mambo mabaya ambago ganamphika mutu.

examples.dg: Fwa kulu ikagwira kijiji chehu mwaka uriopita.
examples.en: A great disaster struck our village last year.
examples.sw: Msiba mkubwa ulipiga kijiji chetu mwaka uliopita.

senses.definition_dg: Kuricha kuishi, roho kutuluka mwirini.

examples.dg: Tsawe wangu akafwa
examples.en: My grandfather has died
examples.sw: Babu yangu alikufa mwezi uliopita.

examples.dg: Rumu hiri rikafwa
examples.en: This knife has become blunt

senses.definition_dg: Kukala ni chinono, chinachofwaha kpwa kazi fulani.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anafwaha kpwa kazi hino.
examples.en: That person is suitable for this job.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anafaa kwa kazi hii.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuhendeza mutu furaha, kumpendeza mutu.

examples.dg: Habari hiyo ikamufwahira sana.
examples.en: That news pleased him greatly.
examples.sw: Habari hiyo ilimpendeza sana.

senses.definition_dg: Pesa ama chitu chinono ambacho unaphaha bada ya kuhenda kazi.

examples.dg: Bishara hino ina fwaida nono.
examples.en: This business has good profit.
examples.sw: Biashara hii ina faida nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphaha fwaida, kufurahiya matunda ga kazi.

examples.dg: Mutu ariye na bidii andafwaidi matundage.
examples.en: A hardworking person will enjoy the fruits of their labor.
examples.sw: Mtu mwenye bidii atafaidi matunda yake.

equivalents_sw: namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu

senses.definition_sw: namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki anayeishi madzini ambaye anaweza kuriwa.

examples.dg: Fwamadzi ni samaki mnono wa kuphikira.
examples.en: Fwamadzi is a good fish for cooking.
examples.sw: Fwamadzi ni samaki mzuri wa kupikia.

senses.definition_en: to scratch with claws, to claw (bird)
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga kpwa kucha kali, kama nyama wa kuruka anavyohenda.

examples.dg: Kuku akamufwara mwana mkpwononi.
examples.en: The chicken scratched the child on the arm.
examples.sw: Kuku alimkuna mtoto mkononi.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga ngozi kpwa kucha kpwa mana inaasha.

examples.dg: Usifwarute ngozi sana, indakuumiza.
examples.en: Don't scratch your skin too much, it will hurt you.
examples.sw: Usikune ngozi sana, itakuumiza.

equivalents_sw: kufurika kwa sababu ya kuchemka au kujaza sana

senses.definition_sw: kufurika kwa sababu ya kuchemka au kujaza sana
senses.definition_dg: Madzi kula ndani ya chombo kutuluka kpwa kupita chipimo.

examples.dg: Madzi ga sufuriya gakafwasa kpwa sababu ya moho mkali.
examples.en: The water in the pot boiled over because of the hot fire.
examples.sw: Maji ya sufuria yalifurika kwa sababu ya moto mkali.

senses.definition_dg: Kutulusa nyoya za nyama wa kuruka kula mwirini.

examples.dg: Fwatsula kuku hiye kabla ya kumuphika.
examples.en: Pluck that chicken before cooking it.
examples.sw: Nyonyoa kuku yule kabla ya kumpika.

senses.definition_dg: Kuondosa chitu chirichofunikira, kufungula.

examples.dg: Fwenula chungu kpwa kuona chirimo ndani.
examples.en: Uncover the pot to see what's inside.
examples.sw: Funua chungu kuona kilichomo ndani.

equivalents_en: die for or on behalf of

senses.definition_en: to die for or on behalf of, to die at (place)
senses.definition_dg: Kufwa phatu fulani ama kufwa kpwa sababu ya mutu wanjina.

examples.dg: Wahufwerera
examples.en: He died for us
examples.sw: Alitufia kwa kutuokoa.

senses.definition_en: to be bereaved, to lose a close friend or family member
senses.definition_dg: Mutu wa phephi yako kufwa, kuphotezwa mutu wa moyo.

examples.dg: Hwafwererwa ni mzehe wehu mwezi uriopita.
examples.en: We were bereaved of our elder last month.
examples.sw: Tulifiwa na mzee wetu mwezi uliopita.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya fyokpwa.

examples.dg: Mwana ana fwidza, muphireni dakitari.
examples.en: The child has diarrhoea, take him to the doctor.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana hara, mpelekeni daktari.

senses.definition_en: to stir, to whisk (e.g. of porridge while still runny)
senses.definition_dg: Kukoroga chitu cha madzi kpwa fimbo ama kijiko, kupekecha.

examples.dg: Fwidza uji huno usije ukaganda.
examples.en: Stir this porridge so it doesn't get lumpy.
examples.sw: Pekecha uji huu usije ukaganda.

senses.definition_dg: Kucheza ngoma kpwa kunyendesa mwiri na mairo.

examples.dg: Ana anapenda kufwiha sherehe ya arusi.
examples.en: The children like to dance at the wedding celebration.
examples.sw: Watoto wanapenda kucheza ngoma kwenye sherehe ya harusi.

equivalents_en: small stick tied horizontally on a hut onto which mud is plastered

senses.definition_en: small stick tied horizontally on a hut onto which mud is plastered
senses.definition_dg: Muhi mdide unaolazwa usawa dzulu ya nyumba ya chila ambao udongo unapakpwa.

examples.dg: Fwiho zinahumirwa kudzenga ukuta wa nyumba ya chila.
examples.en: Small horizontal sticks are used for building traditional house walls.
examples.sw: Ufito unatumika kujenga ukuta wa nyumba ya kienyeji.

senses.definition_dg: Muhi mdide wa kuterya kunyendeka ama kupigira.

examples.dg: Proverb: Fwimbo ya kure taiolaga nyoka
examples.en: A distant stick does not kill a snake
examples.sw: Fimbo ya mbali haiui nyoka.

examples.dg: Proverb: Fwimbo ya mgbwanga ni nyire na fupi
examples.en: The traditional healer's stick is long and short (i.e
examples.sw: Fimbo ya mbali haiui nyoka.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu dzulu ya chitu chanjina kpwa kukifunikira.

examples.dg: Fwinika sufuriya ili moho usiyatuluke.
examples.en: Cover the pot so the heat doesn't escape.
examples.sw: Finika sufuria ili joto lisitoke.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinahumirwa kufunikira chombo ama suffuriya.

examples.dg: Ika fwiniko dzulu ya sufuriya.
examples.en: Put the lid on the pot.
examples.sw: Weka kifiniko juu ya sufuria.

senses.definition_dg: Kucheza ngoma, kufwiha.

examples.dg: Achetu anafwinya kpwa sherehe nono.
examples.en: The women are dancing at the good celebration.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanacheza ngoma kwenye sherehe nzuri.

equivalents_en: heal or prevent illness or misfortune using traditional medicine

senses.definition_en: to heal or prevent illness or misfortune using traditional medicine
senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira dawa ya chila kutibu ama kundziza mwiri kpwa ukongo.

examples.dg: Ali akabatwa ni nyoka kpwa hivyo achafwinywa
examples.en: Ali has been bitten by a snake so he has gone to be treated (by a traditional healer)
examples.sw: Ali aliuma na nyoka kwa hivyo atachanjwa dawa ya kienyeji.

sub_entries.definition_sw: mganga ambaye hujihusisha na kutibu sumu za nyoka, nge, n.k

equivalents_en: dzitso to close one eye to indicate amorous intent
equivalents_sw: kufimba jicho kuonyesha ishara ya mapenzi

senses.definition_en: dzitso to close one eye to indicate amorous intent, to wink
senses.definition_sw: kufimba jicho kuonyesha ishara ya mapenzi
senses.definition_dg: Kucheza ngoma, kufwiha.

examples.dg: Achetu anafwinya kpwa sherehe nono.
examples.en: The women are dancing at the good celebration.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanacheza ngoma kwenye sherehe nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhumira dawa ya chila kutibu ama kundziza mwiri kpwa ukongo.

examples.dg: Ali akabatwa ni nyoka kpwa hivyo achafwinywa.
examples.en: Ali was bitten by a snake so he will be treated with traditional medicine.
examples.sw: Ali aliuma na nyoka kwa hivyo atachanjwa dawa ya kienyeji.

senses.definition_dg: Kufunga matso, ama kutumia neno hiri kpwa mana ya kufwa.

examples.dg: Tsawe akafwinya matso.
examples.en: Grandfather passed away. (euphemism: closed his eyes)
examples.sw: Babu amefunga macho. (kufa)

examples.dg: Tsawe akafwinya matso
examples.en: Grandfather has closed his eyes

senses.definition_dg: Utumewe wa mlume ambaye akakundze kutahiriwa.

examples.dg: Mwana ariye na fwinyu anahitaji kutahiriwa.
examples.en: A child who is uncircumcised needs to be circumcised.
examples.sw: Mtoto ambaye hajatahiriwa anahitaji kutahiriwa.

senses.definition_sw: fira, swila; aina ya nyoka aliye uwezo wa kuinua kichwa na shingo juu sana na kurusha mate, tena hufura shingoni
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyoka mkpwulu ariye na sumu ambaye anaweza kutema mate ya sumu.

examples.dg: Fwira ni nyoka wa hatari sana, jihadhari.
examples.en: The spitting cobra is a very dangerous snake, be careful.
examples.sw: Fira ni nyoka hatari sana, jihadhari.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu phatu ambapho atu anjina taakuona, kuficha.

examples.dg: Proverb: Uchifwitsa ukongo undasemwa ni chiriro
examples.en: If you hide an illness you will be spoken of in mourning
examples.sw: Ukificha ugonjwa utasemwa na mazishi.

senses.definition_en: troublemaker, slanderer, person who causes others to quarrel
senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeeneza maneno mabaya kahi ya atu, mchongezi.

examples.dg: Fyakatsi ni mutu wa hatari kpwa kijiji.
examples.en: A troublemaker is a dangerous person for the village.
examples.sw: Mchongezi ni mtu hatari kwa kijiji.

senses.definition_en: to spring a trap prematurely, to release a bowstring, to pull a trigger
senses.definition_dg: Kupiga chitu kiache kurusha, kama kubandika mtego.

examples.dg: Usifyatule mtego huno, bado taukaikiwa vinono.
examples.en: Don't spring this trap, it hasn't been set properly yet.
examples.sw: Usifyatue mtego huu, bado haujawekwa vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kukandamiza chitu kpwa nguvu, kufinya.

examples.dg: Fyeha nguo hiyo kpwa kuusira madzi.
examples.en: Press that cloth to squeeze out the water.
examples.sw: Finya nguo hiyo kwa kukamua maji.

senses.definition_dg: Kutseka nyasi kpwa panga ama chisu hadi zikale fupi.

examples.dg: Fyeka nyasi za muhala wa nyumba.
examples.en: Cut the grass short in the yard.
examples.sw: Fyeka nyasi za uwanja wa nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na tumbo ra kutsupha-tsupha, kuhara.

examples.dg: Mwana anafyoka kpwa sababu ya chakurya kibaya.
examples.en: The child has diarrhoea because of bad food.
examples.sw: Mtoto anahara kwa sababu ya chakula kibaya.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoboka tundu kpwa chombo cha kunolwa, kudrili.

examples.dg: Fundi nkufyokotsa tundu ndani ya mbao.
examples.en: The craftsman is drilling a hole in the wood.
examples.sw: Fundi anatoboa tundu ndani ya mbao.

senses.definition_dg: Ukongo wa tumbo ambawo unakuhendza utsupha-tsuphe mara nyinji.

examples.dg: Mwana ana fyokpwa, muphireni dakitari.
examples.en: The child has diarrhoea, take him to the doctor.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana hara, mpelekeni daktari.

equivalents_en: gandamira anaweza kuhaphika na kulumwa ni ndani. If a person has diarrhoea he may vomit and have stomach pains

senses.definition_en: gandamira anaweza kuhaphika na kulumwa ni ndani. If a person has diarrhoea he may vomit and have stomach pains
senses.definition_dg: Angaliya gandamira.

examples.dg: Mutu wa fyola anaweza kuaphika na kuumwa ni ndani.
examples.en: A person with diarrhoea may vomit and have stomach pains.
examples.sw: Mtu mwenye hara anaweza kutapika na kuumwa na tumbo.

senses.definition_dg: Kumutania mutu na kumseka, kumdharau.

examples.dg: Usimufyole mutu wanjina, si vinono.
examples.en: Don't ridicule another person, it's not good.
examples.sw: Usimdhihaki mtu mwingine, si vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuambuka muhi, kupanda dzulu ya muhi.

examples.dg: Mwana akafyombera muhi wa mnazi.
examples.en: The child climbed up the coconut tree.
examples.sw: Mtoto alipanda mti wa mnazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuvuta chitu kpwa kanwa, kama kunywa kpwa chirombwe.

examples.dg: Mwana nkufyondza juisi kpwa chirombwe.
examples.en: The child is sucking juice through a straw.
examples.sw: Mtoto anafyonza juisi kwa mirija.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mwiri mdide kpwa kukosa chakurya ama ukongo.

examples.dg: Mkpwongo akafyondzeka sana kpwa ukongo mure.
examples.en: The patient became very thin from the long illness.
examples.sw: Mgonjwa alikonda sana kwa ugonjwa mrefu.

senses.definition_dg: Kupindika, kukala si kugoloka.

examples.dg: Dimba hiri rikafyuka, phahi tairiweza kuhumirwa.
examples.en: This nail is bent, so it can't be used.
examples.sw: Msumari huu umepinda, kwa hivyo hauwezi kutumika.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala si mutu wa kukuluphirwa.

examples.dg: Mutu ariyefyuka si wa kumukuluphira.
examples.en: An untrustworthy person is not to be relied upon.
examples.sw: Mtu ambaye haaminiki si wa kumtegemea.

senses.definition_dg: Kuahirisha dzambo hadi wakati wanjina.

examples.dg: Mkpwutano ukafyulwa hadi wiki yedzayo.
examples.en: The meeting was postponed until next week.
examples.sw: Mkutano uliahirishwa hadi wiki ijayo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhendza chitu chipindike.

examples.dg: Usifyule dimba hiri, risinono.
examples.en: Don't bend this nail, it's not good.
examples.sw: Usipindishe msumari huu, si vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika mtego phatu kpwa kunasa nyama.

examples.dg: Mwindzi akafyusa mtego tsakani.
examples.en: The hunter set a trap in the forest.
examples.sw: Mwindaji aliweka mtego msituni.
